items.title_en: Micron stock jumps 10% as soaring prices from memory crunch lead to quadrupling of revenue
items.title_zh: 美光股价上涨 10%，内存紧缩导致价格飙升，收入翻两番
items.desc_en: Micron's quarterly earnings report follows a 700% surge in the memory maker's stock price over the past year.
items.desc_zh: 美光科技发布季度收益报告之前，这家内存制造商的股价在过去一年中飙升了 700%。

items.title_zh: 克里斯·多纳休将军将辞去欧洲和非洲陆军司令职务，这是最高军事官员的最新离职 - 哥伦比亚广播公司新闻

items.title_en: Federal Reserve says U.S. banks can withstand $708 billion in losses amid overhaul of capital rules
items.title_zh: 美联储称美国银行可承受资本规则改革期间7080亿美元的损失
items.desc_en: The Fed's annual exercise comes at a pivotal moment for bank regulation because, unlike previous years, the results will not affect capital requirements.
items.desc_zh: 美联储的年度演习正值银行监管的关键时刻，因为与往年不同，此次演习的结果不会影响资本要求。

items.title_en: Bitcoin falls back under $60,000, hitting its lowest level since October 2024
items.title_zh: 比特币跌破6万美元，创2024年10月以来最低水平
items.desc_en: Bitcoin, now in the eighth month of its bear market, dropped to an October 2024 low amid a pullback in tech stocks.
items.desc_zh: 比特币目前正处于熊市的第八个月，随着科技股的回调，比特币跌至 2024 年 10 月的低点。

items.title_en: Energy secretary says U.S. has ended Iran's ability to close Strait of Hormuz
items.title_zh: 能源部长称美国已终止伊朗关闭霍尔木兹海峡的能力
items.desc_en: Some 72 ships loaded with 19 million barrels of oil have passed through Hormuz in the past 24 hours, Energy Secretary Chris Wright said.
items.desc_zh: 能源部长克里斯·赖特 (Chris Wright) 表示，过去 24 小时内，约有 72 艘满载 1900 万桶石油的船只通过霍尔木兹海峡。

items.desc_zh: 亚斯米娜声称，她和五个孩子一起被关押，他们都与外界隔绝。

items.title_en: Kenya to charge students with murder over deadly school fire

items.desc_en: Sixteen pupils, aged between 15 and 18, died when a fire broke out in a dormitory at Utumishi Girls' School last month.

items.desc_en: Ahmed al Ahmed tackled one of the gunmen who killed 15 people at a Jewish event in December.
items.desc_zh: 艾哈迈德·艾哈迈德 (Ahmed al Ahmed) 在 12 月的一场犹太活动中击毙了一名枪手，该枪手杀害了 15 人。

items.title_en: Congress passes war powers measure for first time, rebuking Trump's war with Iran
items.title_zh: 国会首次通过战争权力措施，谴责特朗普与伊朗的战争
items.desc_en: The resolution is largely symbolic, but it adds to pressure on the White House to end the conflict once and for all.
items.desc_zh: 该决议在很大程度上是象征性的，但它增加了白宫一劳永逸结束冲突的压力。

items.title_en: House passes affordable housing bill, sends it to Trump's desk
items.title_zh: 众议院通过经济适用房法案，将其送到特朗普的办公桌上
items.desc_en: The House on Tuesday gave final passage to a bill aimed at lowering costs for homebuyers and reining in private equity.
items.desc_zh: 众议院周二最终通过了一项旨在降低购房者成本并控制私募股权的法案。

items.title_en: Sydney woman wakes from induced coma more than a week after shark attack
items.title_zh: 悉尼女子遭鲨鱼袭击一周多后从昏迷中醒来
items.desc_en: Leah Stewart, 34, had one of her arms amputated after she was bitten while swimming at Coogee Beach.
items.desc_zh: 34 岁的利亚·斯图尔特 (Leah Stewart) 在库吉海滩游泳时被咬伤，一只手臂被截肢。

items.title_en: Eight sentenced to 450 years in prison over anti-ICE riot where officer was shot
items.title_zh: 八人因反 ICE 骚乱导致警员被枪杀而被判处 450 年监禁
items.desc_en: An officer was shot in the neck during the Texas disorder by "Antifa Cell operatives", prosecutors said.
items.desc_zh: 检察官称，在得克萨斯州骚乱期间，一名警官被“Antifa Cell”特工开枪射中颈部。

items.desc_zh: 提出更好的问题，实时了解每次通话

items.title_en: Google's YouTube settles social media addiction case with teen
items.title_zh: 谷歌 YouTube 与青少年就社交媒体成瘾案达成和解
items.desc_en: The 15-year-old plaintiff's case against three other tech giants begins next month.
items.desc_zh: 这位 15 岁的原告对另外三家科技巨头的诉讼将于下个月开始。

items.title_en: Germany rail network comes to complete halt nationwide due to IT malfunction
items.title_zh: 由于IT故障，德国铁路网络在全国范围内完全停止
items.desc_en: Rail company Deutsche Bahn has paused train services across the country due to a nationwide IT disruption.
items.desc_zh: 由于全国范围内的 IT 中断，铁路公司德国铁路公司已暂停全国范围内的火车服务。

items.title_en: Meta halts worker tracking for AI training due to privacy fears
items.title_zh: 由于担心隐私问题，Meta 停止追踪人工智能培训的员工
items.desc_en: The company had started just two months ago tracking workers’ computer usage for AI training data.
items.desc_zh: 该公司两个月前才开始跟踪员工的计算机使用情况以获取人工智能培训数据。

items.title_en: Dozens of ships head through Strait of Hormuz after US-Iran deal
items.title_zh: 美伊达成协议后数十艘船只驶过霍尔木兹海峡
items.desc_en: Traffic in the waterway has risen since the US and Iran signed a deal aimed at ending the war, including 42 ships on Saturday alone.
items.desc_zh: 自美国和伊朗签署旨在结束战争的协议以来，该水道的交通量有所增加，仅周六就有 42 艘船只。

items.title_en: Steam Machine launches with £879 price tag as Valve cites component costs
items.title_zh: Valve 称 Steam Machine 的组件成本为 879 英镑
items.desc_en: Valve said the cost of its PC-console hybrid reflects a broader trend of component costs rising over time.
items.desc_zh: Valve表示，其PC-控制台混合体的成本反映了组件成本随着时间的推移而上升的更广泛趋势。

items.title_zh: 100 家医院如何改用笔和纸来抵御全国性网络攻击
items.desc_en: For four days, dozens of Romanian hospitals went offline, as cyber-experts sought to defeat the hackers.
items.desc_zh: 四天内，数十家罗马尼亚医院关闭，网络专家试图击败黑客。

items.title_en: Millions in UK could claim share of £3bn after Apple case given green light
items.title_zh: 苹果案获得批准后，英国数百万人可索赔 30 亿英镑
items.desc_en: Apple rejected the suggestion its practices are anti-competitive, saying many customers rely on third-party alternatives.
items.desc_zh: 苹果否认了其做法反竞争的说法，称许多客户依赖第三方替代品。

items.desc_zh: 水分追踪设备充斥市场，但信息量是否太多？

items.title_zh: Will Cathcart 退出后 WhatsApp 将由印度初创公司创始人领导

items.desc_zh: WhatsApp 领导层变动之际，Meta 希望加强其应用程序在印度已经蓬勃发展的影响力。

items.desc_zh: 查恩的一份报告称，科技公司和当局关注裸体而不是同意，从而辜负了女性的期望。
